messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Create a minimal single-page landing site for a lab technician. One HTML, responsive, hero + subtitle, services list, contact form (no backend; alert). Colors: red/black/white only. Include README and one Jest test that asserts hero title is present.
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Create a minimal single-page landing site for a lab technician. One HTML, responsive, hero + subtitle, services list, contact form (no backend; alert). Colors: red/black/white only. Include README and one Jest test that asserts hero title is present.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "initialize-project-structure",
      "title": "Initialize project structure",
      "description": "Create a minimal project with index.html (single page), styles.css, script.js, README.md, and package.json, linking CSS and JS in the HTML and adding a basic semantic HTML skeleton.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Repository contains index.html, styles.css, script.js, README.md, and package.json; index.html correctly links styles.css and script.js; opening index.html shows no console errors."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-responsive-layout-and-styles",
      "title": "Implement responsive layout and styles",
      "description": "Add mobile-first CSS using only red, black, and white; define simple layout, typography, spacing, and media queries to ensure the page adapts well on small and large screens with good contrast.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "initialize-project-structure"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "At 360px and 1200px widths, layout has no horizontal scrollbars; CSS color values are limited to red, black, and white (including shades only of these); text is readable with sufficient contrast."
    },
    {
      "id": "add-hero-and-subtitle",
      "title": "Add hero section and subtitle",
      "description": "Create a hero section in index.html with a prominent, accessible title (h1) and a subtitle (p) that introduces the lab technician; ensure the section is styled responsively.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "initialize-project-structure",
        "implement-responsive-layout-and-styles"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Hero contains an h1 and a descriptive subtitle; text is visible on both light and dark backgrounds; structure validates with no HTML errors."
    },
    {
      "id": "add-services-list-section",
      "title": "Add services list section",
      "description": "Insert a services section listing key offerings using semantic HTML (e.g., section with h2 and ul/li items) and ensure spacing and layout match the overall style.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "add-hero-and-subtitle"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Services section displays at least three concise items; list is readable on mobile and desktop; no additional colors beyond red, black, and white are introduced."
    },
    {
      "id": "add-contact-form-with-alert",
      "title": "Add contact form with alert behavior",
      "description": "Create a contact form with labeled fields for name, email, and message; prevent default submission in script.js and show an alert confirming submission; use basic HTML5 validation.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "add-services-list-section"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Submitting the form triggers a JavaScript alert and does not navigate away; labels are associated with inputs; required fields prevent empty submission; no backend calls are made."
    },
    {
      "id": "set-up-jest-and-test-hero-title",
      "title": "Set up Jest and write hero title test",
      "description": "Configure Jest in package.json with jsdom environment and add a test that loads index.html and asserts that the hero title element is present (e.g., by role or data-testid).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "add-hero-and-subtitle"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Running `npm test` executes Jest successfully and the test passes by confirming the hero title exists in the DOM."
    },
    {
      "id": "write-readme",
      "title": "Write README with usage and test instructions",
      "description": "Draft README.md describing the project purpose, how to open the site, how to run tests, design choices (red/black/white only), and how responsiveness is handled.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "add-contact-form-with-alert",
        "set-up-jest-and-test-hero-title"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README includes setup steps, run instructions for tests, feature list (hero, services, contact form with alert), color policy, and notes on responsiveness."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Feature-based sequential plan with dependency chaining for build, styling, features, testing, and documentation"
}
